home_of_month_description: This custom designed Expanded Adult Residential Care Home is located in Salt Lake. Conveniently located only 10 minutes to town and 30 minutes from Windward side through H-3 freeway.  Close to all major hospitals (Kaiser, Pali Momi Medical Center, Kuakini Medical Center ,Queens Medical Center Punchbowl, Straub Hospital).

Caring Ohana Care Home is a beautifully designed, serene  Adult Residential Care Home located in Waipahu, next to Waikele outlet and only a minute or so next to  H-1 Freeway exit.  Only  minutes to QMC-West and Pali Momi Medical Center.

This Adult Residential Care Home is beautifully newly renovated and located in Kalihi Valley. Care Provider is an experienced Registered Nurse (RN).Conveniently located and only minutes to major hospitals.
